assertions.title: Header-only mode remains a valid degraded contract

steps.action: Run analyze with --header-only against /Users/treygoff/Code/rlcoach/Replay_files/testing_replay.replay using the project venv
steps.expected: CLI exits 0 and writes a degraded header-only report
steps.observed: CLI exited with code 0 and wrote /tmp/rlcoach-ut-analyze-header-only-rerun/testing_replay.json

steps.action: Validate the generated JSON with rlcoach.schema.validate_report
steps.expected: Output remains schema-valid even in degraded mode

steps.action: Inspect parser diagnostics and header metadata
steps.expected: Header metadata is preserved and degraded parser state is explicit
steps.observed: quality.parser.name=rust, parsed_header=true, parsed_network_data=false, network_diagnostics.status=unavailable, network_diagnostics.error_code=network_data_unavailable, frames_emitted=0; top-level metadata preserved map=EuroStadium_Dusk_P, playlist=DOUBLES, team_size=2, duration_seconds=0.0

steps.expected: Absence of network-derived content is explicit when parsed_network_data=false / frames_emitted=0
steps.observed: events.timeline=0, events.goals=0, events.demos=0, events.touches=0, events.kickoffs=0; analysis.per_player has 0 entries; analysis.per_team retains degraded team buckets only

evidence.summary: Header-only rerun now satisfies the degraded contract: exit code 0, schema-valid output, explicit parser-unavailable network diagnostics, preserved top-level header metadata, and zero network-derived event arrays.

summary: Retested VAL-ANALYZE-004C via local CLI execution. The header-only analyze flow now passes: it exits 0, validates against the report schema, preserves top-level header metadata, and explicitly omits network-derived events while reporting parsed_network_data=false and frames_emitted=0.
